instruction.title: Responsive Strategy & Layout Adaptations
instruction.overview: This document defines the responsive breakpoints, fluid scaling rules, mobile drawer layouts, bento grid wraps, and touch target standards.

breakpoint.action: Convert inline navbar to mobile menu.

drawer.styling: position: fixed; top: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; width: min(320px, 85vw); background: var(--bg-surface); z-index: 1000;
drawer.animation: Initially off-screen right (transform: translate3d(100%, 0, 0)). Active state translates to center (translate3d(0, 0, 0)) using var(--ease-snappy).
drawer.behavior: Locks parent document scroll. Clicking backdrop dismisses drawer.

feature_showcase.rule: On mobile viewports (max-width: 991px), alternating row directions collapse and stack vertically.
Force flex-direction: column !important to ensure illustration graphics always display above the text content block.

layout.value: Touch swiping interface with paging indicator dots

touch_targets.rule: All buttons, select dropdowns, selectors, and accordion triggers maintain target size >= 44px x 44px.
Interactive links inside mobile drawer have margins/paddings spacing buffer >= 12px.
Active state CSS feedback (:active) darkens indicators on screen touch.
